ogTitle: Keppel Sands vs Kerry: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Keppel Sands and Kerry.
heading: Keppel Sands vs Kerry — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Keppel Sands, Queensland and Kerry, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Keppel Sands has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Kerry (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Keppel Sands or Kerry safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Keppel Sands has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Kerry scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Keppel Sands scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Kerry scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Keppel Sands or Kerry?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Keppel Sands has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.77% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
